varieties.name: Florence Fennel
varieties.traits: Classic bulbing type, swollen white bulbous base, feathery green foliage, 60-90cm tall
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection, Succeed Heirlooms Australia, Eden Seeds

varieties.name: Zefa Fino
varieties.traits: Compact form, small to medium bulbs (7-12cm), upright growth, dark green foliage
varieties.availability: Australian seed suppliers, Seedaholic, specialist nurseries

varieties.name: Perfection
varieties.traits: Large, uniform bulbs, bolt-resistant, beautifully shaped white flat-round bulbs
varieties.availability: Nichols Garden Nursery, Wood Prairie Farm, Wild Garden Seed

varieties.name: Romanesco
varieties.traits: Large heirloom variety, plump oval bulbs up to 1kg, thick tightly wrapped stalks, feathery foliage

varieties.name: Orion (F1 Hybrid)
varieties.traits: Large uniform bulbs, thick stalks, vigorous upright plants, softball-size bulbs
varieties.availability: Johnny's Selected Seeds, commercial suppliers, West Coast Seeds

varieties.name: Preludio (F1 Hybrid)
varieties.traits: Very early, medium-sized round white bulbs, upright plants, pristine appearance
varieties.availability: High Mowing Seeds, Territorial Seed, West Coast Seeds (organic)

varieties.name: Mantovano
varieties.traits: Large round very white bulbs, mid-early vigorous plant, crisp texture

varieties.name: Sweet Fennel (Herb Type)
varieties.traits: Tall perennial (up to 2m), fine feathery foliage, small base, grown for leaves/seeds
varieties.yield_notes: High seed production; continuous leaf harvest
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection, most Australian seed suppliers

varieties.name: Bronze Fennel (Purpureum)
varieties.traits: Ornamental variety, bronze-purple foliage when young, turns grey-green, 1.5-2m tall, yellow flowers
varieties.yield_notes: Moderate seed yield; continuous foliage harvest
varieties.availability: White Flower Farm, Metchosin Farm Seeds, Australian garden centers

varieties.name: Trieste (Solaris)
varieties.traits: Coppery bronze flowers, medium bulbs, uniform growth
varieties.availability: Renee's Garden, specialist seed companies

varieties.name: Selma Fino
varieties.traits: Similar to Zefa Fino, slow-bolting, large tender bulbs
varieties.availability: West Coast Seeds Canada, specialty suppliers

varieties.name: Victorio
varieties.traits: Large, crisp bulbs, compact plants
varieties.availability: Territorial Seeds, European suppliers

varieties.name: CO-1 (Coimbatore)
varieties.traits: Medium tall plants with profuse branching, dark green seeds, compact umbels
varieties.availability: TNAU, tropical monsoon climates agricultural stores, government seed centers

varieties.name: Gujarat Fennel-1 (GF-1)
varieties.traits: Tall bushy plants, oblong medium-bold dark green seeds, large umbels

varieties.name: PF-35 (Pilwai Fennel-35)
varieties.traits: Tall spreading plants, medium-sized hairless green seeds
varieties.availability: GAU, Indian agricultural stores, available in tropical monsoon climates

varieties.name: RF-35 (Rajasthan Fennel-35)
varieties.traits: Tall spreading variety, medium-sized hairless green seeds
varieties.availability: Indian seed suppliers, agricultural universities

varieties.name: Ajmer Fennel-1 (AF-1)
varieties.traits: Erect tall plants, large umbels, bold medium-sized fragrant seeds
varieties.availability: NRCSS Ajmer, tropical monsoon climates agricultural stores, all-India availability

varieties.name: RF-101 (Rajasthan Fennel-101)
varieties.origin: SKN College of Agriculture, Jobner, Rajasthan, 1995
varieties.traits: Tall erect plants with stout stems, large umbels, long bold grains

varieties.name: RF-125 (Rajasthan Fennel-125)
varieties.origin: SKN College of Agriculture, Jobner, Rajasthan
varieties.traits: Short plants with compact umbels, long bold grains
varieties.availability: RAU Jobner, tropical monsoon climates agricultural stores

varieties.name: Hisar Swarup
varieties.traits: Medium height (132cm), spreading type, long bold fruits
varieties.availability: HAU Hisar, Indian seed suppliers, available in tropical monsoon climates

varieties.name: RF-143 (Rajasthan Fennel-143)
varieties.origin: SKN College of Agriculture, Jobner, from Italian collection EC-243380, 1997
varieties.traits: Early, short stature, compact umbels, long bold seeds
varieties.availability: SKN Agricultural University, tropical monsoon climates seed suppliers

varieties.name: Rajendra Sourabha
varieties.traits: Medium vigor, adapted to Indian conditions
varieties.availability: Indian agricultural universities, tropical monsoon climates seed suppliers

varieties.name: Pant Madhurika
varieties.traits: Sweet variety, adapted to varied Indian conditions

varieties.name: UF-32
varieties.traits: Indian commercial variety
varieties.availability: South Indian agricultural stores

varieties.name: Gujarat Fennel-2 (GF-2)
varieties.traits: Improved selection from Gujarat breeding program

varieties.name: Gujarat Fennel-11 (GF-11)
varieties.origin: Spice Research Centre, Gujarat Agricultural University, Jagudan
varieties.traits: High-yielding variety, vigorous plants

varieties.name: Florence Fennel (adapted selections)
varieties.traits: Bulbing type with swollen base (when conditions suitable)
varieties.availability: International seed sources, limited tropical monsoon climates success

varieties.name: Sweet Fennel (Indian Type)
varieties.traits: Tall perennial herb type, fine feathery foliage, grown for leaves and seeds
varieties.availability: tropical monsoon climates nurseries, traditional spice gardens, local sources

varieties.name: Bronze Fennel (Indian Cultivation)
varieties.traits: Ornamental bronze foliage, tall plants
